title: Innovative Spanish Avocado Ssam Wrap
description: A tangy and adventurous Spanish dish featuring avocado hass pulp, ssam-wrap, and plant-based friendly ingredients, served on a wooden board.
instructions: Cut the avocado in half and remove the pit, then mash the pulp in a bowl with a fork until it's mostly smooth.
Heat the olive oil in a small pan over medium heat and add the smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the pan and cook for 2 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
Add the sliced red onion to the pan and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the onions are translucent.
Stir in the lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the ssam wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a quarter of the mashed avocado on each wrap, then topping with a quarter of the tomato and onion mixture.
Sprinkle a quarter of the chopped cilantro over the top of each wrap.
Serve the wraps on a wooden board, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
